_comment: Template — copy to autviam_config.json and fill values. Schema version 1.
_nested_dispatch_help: off | on | auto — E2E execution mode. 'off' (default in Claude Code) runs each phase inline; 'on' uses the orchestrator subagent (needs an env that allows nested dispatch); 'auto' probes once and falls back to 'off'.
_project_help: 'disable' (default) = no GitHub Project sync. Otherwise a board: "Project Name" (owner defaults to repo owner), or {"owner":"X","name":"..."} / {"owner":"X","number":N}.
